response.step_by_step_log: I watched the entire video from start to finish. I listened carefully to all audio layers, including the dialogue and background music. The background music is a low, ambient, instrumental horror track designed to set a mood. No vocal music was detected at any point in the video. Therefore, no web searches for lyrics were required.
response.global_summary: The video is an interview between the virtual YouTuber Akai Haato and a curse collector named Tanaka Toshiyuki. The entire segment features their dialogue accompanied by eerie, instrumental horror-style background music. There is no vocal music in this video segment.

scenes.description: Akai Haato interviews the curse collector Tanaka Toshiyuki in a room filled with various cursed objects. The dialogue continues for the duration of the clip with ambient instrumental background music.
